reviews.review_title: Multiplayer and more cars would be nice
reviews.review_description: The game is really solid and fun if you are bored and just wanna drive, chill, and drift. Also I'm not sure if the developer is still updating the game but I hope so because this game has potential. New cars would be nice and more variety maps, and if not new cars diff engines and exhaust's with modifications.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! As mentioned in the game start screen, the game was concluded years ago and we have been focusing on other games since then. Cheers!

reviews.review_title: Good game but just feels lonely
reviews.review_description: The sense of speed is perfect the driving mechanics are perfect the only  problem  is it just feels lonely  its like driving  in a ghost  town no traffic  small map with only roads it needs traffic and of course  it needs a option  to turn off traffic adding more details  to the map would  be nice and making the map bigger of course   it also needs multi-player good job btw

developer_response.body: Sad to see you lowered the review score, but unfortunately V-Speedway was concluded years ago as explained in-game; we moved on to a much better, more polished and continuously updated game!

reviews.review_description: This game is SO fun but there are never any updates. They need multiplayer, optional traffic, new and bigger maps, more cars, customizable drivers/cars, and more. I hope the developers see this and go crazy with their game making it go to possibly 5 stars.

developer_response.body: Hi, V-Speedway is an old game concluded some years ago, as mentioned in the game welcome page. You can check out our newer games with almost everything you mentioned, constantly updated! Check the in-game newsfeed.

developer_response.body: As explained in the start screen, V-Speedway was concluded as it is years ago, it's a complete project, we just moved on to newer and better games. Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
I think this game is really great if you’re on the track by yourself. The only thing that destroys it is the awful ai.
When you play in the racing game mode against them they all follow one line. If you get in the way of this line they will smash in to you which locks your steering. The steering lock is incredibly annoying because most of the time you end up slamming in to a wall and ruins the entire race.
Not only this but if you get the lightest tap you also loose lots of speed which is incredibly unrealistic.
The boring lines that the ai picks in which ends up becoming predictable, the lack of space you get when they all robotically turn into the corners and the horrible physics (Slowing down,  steering locking etc) makes playing with the bots unbearable.

The game is very fun to play.
I hope to add multiplayer online. That's the game I play the most. My tame on single rece and time attack is 42.733. Please add multiplayer.

reviews.review_title: I find this game quite bad
reviews.review_description: The AI in race mode are impossible to beat even in beginner! they follow one path and will smash into you if you go with the path its very annoying and repetetive

This game is really nice. It's fun to drive in these cars. But only flippin alone. Why? The Artificial intelligence is more like Artificial Flipping numb axe, never actually look at you, never leaving space and obviously driving straight into you, and putting you into the wall. If it's like it takes some sick pleasure of ruining our game. Why also does AI have why does it have more pushforce? When you try to bump into em, they won't budge, but when they merely
 even touch you, you get sent to Valhalla. Not to mention , their cars are so faster than yours, a car behind you is able to tickle your balls before you even get to the first turn. I love the way you drive in this game, but i hate the AI with a burning passion. Also, Multiplayer would be fun.

This is a very good game especially to be for free but if they added or add multiplayer to the game it woul be better and they need to make an open map to where you can js hang out by yourself or (if they add multiplayer) with friends

reviews.review_description: This game is about battling AI with a pre-defined race path and no sense of self preservation. In other words, you're on one team, all the AI are on the other, rather than it feeling like a free for all.

developer_response.body: We never announced multiplayer for V-Speedway, the game has always been a small free project that was concluded in 2022, never an Early Access game. as it is clearly explained in the welcome screen. We are only delivering patches and fixes when necessary.

reviews.review_title: I love this game so much but there’s one
reviews.review_description: This game I could’ve gave a five star until I started to learn how to drift every time I drift I pull the handbrake. I only do the handbrake press then do my break but every time I’m in a race or just free driving my game decides to just fall on whipped my steering wheel full on left or right and I can’t get it undone. Please fix it

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! The in-game Driving Tips explain exactly why that happens and how you can avoid it, also by checking the alert indicators on your hands.

reviews.review_description: This game shows significant promise, however, the AI requires substantial improvement.  Currently, opponents exhibit erratic behavior, frequently colliding with the me.  Starting position heavily influences race outcome; a first-place start virtually guarantees victory, while starting second often results in last place.  Furthermore, some sharp turns cause an unintended hand position reversal, requiring the player to release and readjust their grip on the steering wheel.  While highly enjoyable, several refinements are necessary to optimize the gameplay experience.
I love this game I got so addicted to it and now every day I play it I would recommend it to anyone who is looking for a free racing game.

The game is fun and very enjoyable up until hairpin type corners the cars don’t have enough grip when slow and the AI drift past you with no problem. Another problem I have is when turning the bots decides it the perfect time to drift and I do a 360. If yall could just add a little bit more grip it would be great.  Another game mode like a formula or different cars would be nice as well

reviews.review_title: Better than the paid Downtown club
reviews.review_description: I had so much fun with this free game that I bought the developer's early access Downtown club, but could not get into it. The roads seemed much smaller and more difficult to navigate, but more importantly, I could no longer drive in manual transmission, it is almost impossible to change gears manually. That's not the case here in VSpeedway because the gear shifter is very large and fun to use. Wish they had made the shifter larger in downtown club, haptics stronger, and a audible sound or something to let you know when you've changed gears. Without having a physical shifter in hand, I know that this is tricky to do, but Vspeedway does a much better job changing gears and driving in general than Downtown club. If you are simply looking to drive in automatic, then the more polished downtown club is the way to go for sure. If downtown club comes out of early access with a functional and usable manual shifter, I would repurchase.

developer_response.body: The two games are hardly comparable, V-Speedway is completely arcade with on-rails driving and easy controls (it's inspired by Mario Kart!), while Downtown Club is a simcade at the core and still in Early Access. But nice to hear you found your preference here!
